paid his/her monthly premium for Part B coverage (and 
Part A if necessary). State Medicaid programs can pay those premiums for certain dual eligibles; this 
action is called “buying in” and so this variable is the “buy-in code.” 

Effective with MBSF ABDC V2, a beneficiary with a verified or unverified date of death will have a ‘0’ 
for any month that is after the death date.
